flags.message: The brief in opposition (filed Jul 15 2026, link present in the 2026-07-16 snapshot) was not provisioned under record/documents/ — documents.json lists only the petition and questions-presented. I fetched the BIO directly from the supremecourt.gov docket link (forward mode) and it materially changed the forecast: it discloses an unopposed, already-granted Third Amended Complaint in the district court that pleads the previously omitted facts, a significant vehicle defect. If the document fetcher runs before BIO text extraction, cells one day after a BIO lands may systematically miss the single most predictive document.
